commands.name: packetLog.readRelayLog
commands.label: Read Relay Packet Log
commands.description: Tail the embedded Shockless relay log and parse client/server packet rows, payload byte counts, decrypted bodies, v3 names, and decoded packet-family fields into the Packet Log panel.
